name: Configure Mail DNS
description: Create MX and SPF TXT records in Cloudflare for the mail domain. Runs only when 'smtp_own_domain' is true. Idempotent — checks existing records before creating. Requires CF_TOKEN from a cloudflare stack.

parameters.name: Cloudflare API Token
parameters.description: Cloudflare API token with Zone:DNS:Edit permission on the mail domain zone. Provided via the cloudflare stack. Required when smtp_own_domain is true.
